summary: Plan-only assessment of five open PR inventory candidates. No merge actions are recommended because the artifact does not include complete merge preflight proof, including hydrated comments/review-bot findings and a clean Codex /review. Two PRs have concrete repair/review blockers; the others need maintainer finalization judgment rather than automated mutation.

actions.reason: The PR appears narrow and maintainer-modifiable, but it needs repair or revalidation before finalization because the behavior-proof gate is failing and merge preflight is incomplete.

This looks close to mergeable, but the artifact lacks mandatory merge preflight proof. A maintainer or executor should hydrate comments/review-bot findings and run Codex /review before deciding merge.
This is not safe to repair or merge automatically from the compact artifact because it is waiting on author, has failed relevant checks, and touches runtime/auth/session-sensitive behavior.
Despite passing checks, the change is broad enough and compatibility-sensitive enough that the job's broad-code-delta guard requires maintainer judgment or full merge preflight before merge.
This is likely the lowest-risk candidate, but merge still needs complete live preflight and Codex /review proof before a merge recommendation.

needs_human: #86088: likely mergeable after live comment/review-bot hydration and Codex /review, but merge preflight proof is missing.
#86224: waiting on author, failed checks, and broad runtime/auth/session-sensitive diff require maintainer judgment.
#86233: broad compatibility-sensitive Codex app-server retention change requires full review context and maintainer finalization.
#86608: small docs/scripts PR has passing checks but still lacks hydrated discussion/review-bot context and Codex /review proof.

repair_candidate.summary: Repair/revalidate #86085 rather than merge as-is. The narrow contributor branch updates zh-TW terminology assets, but the live preflight Real behavior proof gate is failing and mandatory merge preflight proof is absent.
repair_candidate.pr_title: i18n(zh-TW): align Control UI locale with Taiwan terminology
repair_candidate.pr_body: Repair plan for #86085: keep the contributor's focused zh-TW terminology changes, re-run the locale validation/proof path, address any failing Real behavior proof requirements, and preserve @p3nchan credit in the final PR body. This should not expand beyond the three i18n files already touched unless validation identifies a directly related generated baseline.
validation_commands: Run the repository i18n locale validation covering zh-TW key parity and translation-shape checks.
Rerun the Real behavior proof workflow for #86085.
Run Codex /review before any merge recommendation.
credit_notes: Preserve contributor credit for @p3nchan as the source PR author if the branch is repaired or replaced.
Reference https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/86085 in any replacement PR body.
